public_reputation: Coordinator of shared tools, kiln access, and journeyman disputes inside craft-heavy guild infrastructure.
appearance: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn carries the marks of pattern forewoman in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a pattern forewoman whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Craftspire.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of pattern forewoman in and around Craftspire, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Craftspire while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Craftspire.
Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a pattern forewoman.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn is readable as a pattern forewoman tied to Craftspire.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Craftspire: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn presents as someone shaped by the duties of a pattern forewoman and the daily pressures of Craftspire.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a pattern forewoman, and proof that strangers will not make Craftspire harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a pattern forewoman too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn always knows more about Craftspire than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to pattern forewoman duties in Craftspire.
social_texture: Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Craftspire, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Pattern touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Pattern Forewoman Melis Thorn when the party needs a socially grounded face for Craftspire: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
